summary: A designed retro-futurist graphic system combining bold 1980s geometry, controlled neon gradients, dark negative space, and a clear focal hierarchy.
composition_principles: use neon as accents rather than full coverage

route_a.objective: Create a seamless retro-futurist graphic repeat with complete motifs at every crop.
composition_rules: alternate warm and cool focal accents

route_b.objective: Create a poster-like weapon-space composition whose focal hierarchy survives UV baking.
composition_rules: receiver carries the main disc or wedge

component_roles.stock: dark horizon field with one broad gradient band
component_roles.receiver: primary sun disc or geometric focal mark
component_roles.handguard: one or two broad orbital or speed arcs
component_roles.barrel_muzzle: quiet dark finish without focal detail

candidate_directions.title: Sunset Drive
candidate_directions.concept: A bold sun disc and horizontal speed bands evoke a graphic night drive.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: cropped discs and wedges interlock across tile edges
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: the receiver sun disc leads a stock-to-handguard motion path

candidate_directions.title: Orbital Arcade
candidate_directions.concept: Orbital arcs and stepped arcade geometry form a playful technical rhythm.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: arc fragments reconnect into a seamless field
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: one orbital centre anchors the receiver with restrained arcs forward

candidate_directions.title: Neon Construct
candidate_directions.concept: Large abstract blocks create a disciplined constructivist neon composition.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: large blocks form readable repeat units
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: component proportions determine the block hierarchy

candidate_directions.title: Midnight Signal
candidate_directions.concept: Sparse signal bars and one luminous disc create a calmer premium variant.
candidate_directions.route_a_emphasis: sparse accents repeat over generous navy ground
candidate_directions.route_b_emphasis: one receiver signal mark is supported by very quiet surrounding surfaces

reference_policy: Build an original vocabulary from broad period-design characteristics and clearly licensed references; do not imitate a specific poster, studio, or artist.
